name: negentropy
description: 逆熵 - 理性辩论平台

scripts.dev: concurrently -n BE,FE -c yellow,cyan "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n BE,FE -c yellow,cyan "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.lint: cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../backend && npm run lint
scripts.format: cd frontend && npm run format && cd ../backend && npm run format
scripts.test: cd frontend && npm test && cd ../backend && npm test
